sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, created_at DateTime, nullable_col Nullable(Int32), value String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30'), NULL, 'Test'), (2, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:25:45'), 100, 'Sample'), (3, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:30:00'), 200, 'Check');
SELECT id, value, toStartOfMinute(created_at) AS start_minute FROM test_dates WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, toStartOfMinute(created_at), IF(nullable_col IS NULL, 'No Value', toString(nullable_col)) AS col_value FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, toStartOfMinute(created_at), start_minute IS NULL AS is_null_check FROM (SELECT id, toStartOfMinute(created_at) AS start_minute FROM test_dates) AS sub WHERE id = 3;
SELECT DISTINCT value FROM (SELECT value, nullable_col IS NULL AS null_check FROM test_dates) WHERE null_check = 0;
SELECT AVG(IF(nullable_col IS NULL, 0, nullable_col)) AS avg_value FROM test_dates GROUP BY toStartOfMinute(created_at) HAVING avg_value > 50;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_dates) WHERE length(value) > 4) AND created_at IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_edges (id Int32, nullable_col Nullable(DateTime), value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_edges VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30'), 1), (2, NULL, 2), (3, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:25:45'), 3);
SELECT id, toStartOfMinute(nullable_col) AS rounded_col FROM test_edges WHERE rounded_col IS NULL OR rounded_col >= toStartOfMinute(toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:30:00'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(nullable_col) AS rounded FROM test_edges GROUP BY rounded HAVING rounded IS NULL) AS sub;
SELECT t1.value, toStartOfMinute(t2.created_at) FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_edges AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value = (SELECT max(value) FROM test_dates);
